title: SCRP 2: Champions
description: Cobblemon Roleplay for Content Creators and VTubers
body:
This is a VTuber friendly Cobblemon modpack that was put together by Saiiren for her Pokémon Roleplay Event on Minecraft.

It includes proximity chat, area claims, emotes, Cobblemon-related quality of life mods as well as base Minecraft quality of life mods. There is also TPA and various other mods for decorating.

This modpack was created for large numbers of players and with roleplay capabilities in mind. We hope you have fun playing when using this modpack!
